---
description: A component for composition live controls in React.
---

A component for composition live controls in React.

## Usage

A React hook to initialize the live control values.

```ts
function useLiveControls(
  values: Record<string, any>,
  controls: Controls,
  noControls: boolean,
): Record<string, any>
```

A type for the live compositions in React.

```ts
type ReactLiveComposition = {
  Comp: React.ComponentType;
  props: Record<string, any>;
  controls?: Controls;
  render?: (
    args: Record<string, any>,
    Comp: React.ComponentType
  ) => React.ReactNode;
  noControls?: boolean;
};
```

A React component to preview the composition with the live controls.

```tsx
function LivePreview(props: ReactLiveComposition): React.ReactNode;

<LivePreview
  Comp={Button}
  props={{ ... }}
  controls={{ ... }}
/>
```

A React component to preview the composition without the live controls.

```tsx
function SimplePreview(props: ReactLiveComposition): React.ReactNode;

<SimplePreview
  Comp={Button}
  props={{ ... }}
  controls={{ ... }}
/>
```
